text:
Once upon a time in a forest deep within the mountains, there lived a wise old owl named Olive. She hadn\'t seen much sunshine in years, her nest hidden deep among centuries-old oaks. Every dawn, Olive would flutter out, stretching her bright eyes in the early light. One day, while circling lazily she noticed something unexpected.

A young squirrel was bouncing on one foot. Olive perched on a sturdy branch.

“Hello there,” she beckoned softly.

The squirrel squeaked in surprise.

“Do you always talk?”

The squirrel thought for a moment. “Well...once in a while.”

“How interesting.”

The squirrel paused. “Would you?” It chirped eagerly.

Orchestra began to fill the forest. Olive flew through a melodious symphony of tweets, rustles, and calls. The young squirrel danced and sang along. It filled the forest with joy.

Olive flew low, her beautiful eyes sparkling. “We all have hidden talents.”
